summary: Phase 5 Firebase Authentication testing completed successfully. All auth features working correctly: Login screen with Arabic greeting and Islamic theme, signup with role selection (Student/Teacher only), pending approval screen, admin controls on About tab, admin users management screen. Previous features (tabs, courses, teachers, library) remain functional. Admin accounts (xioasad@gmail.com, sumraftm@gmail.com) already approved in Firestore.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-critical, same as previous iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Firebase Auth configured with AsyncStorage persistence for session management
✓ AuthContext provides signIn, signUp, signOut, refreshProfile methods
✓ AuthGate in _layout.tsx handles routing: unauthenticated -> login, pending -> pending screen, approved/admin -> main app
✓ Login screen has Arabic greeting 'السلام عليكم', email/password inputs, Sign In button, Sign Up link
✓ Login screen has Islamic theme (dark green background, white card)
✓ Invalid login shows error message with proper error handling
✓ Signup screen has Arabic greeting 'بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ', name/email/password inputs, role selection
✓ Role selection only shows Student and Teacher buttons (no Admin option as required)
✓ Signup creates user in Firebase Auth and Firestore 'users' collection with status='pending'
✓ Pending screen shows user info (name, role, status), Check Status button, Sign Out button
✓ Pending screen correctly blocks non-admin pending users from accessing main app
✓ Admin accounts (xioasad@gmail.com, sumraftm@gmail.com) already have role='admin' and status='approved' in Firestore
✓ About tab shows profile card with user name, email, role, and sign out button
✓ Admin controls section visible only for admin role (Manage Users, Add Book buttons)
✓ Admin users screen at /admin/users fetches users from Firestore and displays with approve/reject actions
✓ Admin users screen shows user cards with name, email, role badge, status badge, and action buttons
✓ Approve button visible for pending users (non-admin)
✓ Revoke button visible for approved users (non-admin)
✓ Sign out functionality works correctly and redirects to login screen
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Previous features from iterations 1-4 still working (Home, Courses, Teachers, Library tabs)
✓ Session persistence working with AsyncStorage

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend in this app (Firebase only)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 5 Auth features working as expected

seed_data_creation: Test student account created: teststudent1869@test.com (status=pending). Admin accounts already exist in Firestore: xioasad@gmail.com and sumraftm@gmail.com (both role=admin, status=approved). Teacher account exists: interncareer7@gmail.com (role=teacher, status=approved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Firebase Authentication complete and tested. Login/signup flows working with email+password. Role selection limited to Student/Teacher (no Admin option in signup). Pending approval screen blocks non-admin pending users. Admin accounts (xioasad@gmail.com, sumraftm@gmail.com) already approved in Firestore. About tab shows profile card and admin controls (Manage Users, Add Book) for admin role. Admin users screen allows approve/reject actions. Session persistence with AsyncStorage working. All previous features (tabs, courses, teachers, library) remain functional. App loads at https://expo-audit-hub.preview.emergentagent.com

rca_of_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All Phase 5 Firebase Authentication features working as designed. Minor timing issues in some tests were due to async operations and network latency, not actual bugs.
